headline: King's Indian Defense: Orthodox Variation, Classical System (E98) shows the strongest positive human-vs-engine gap, while Benoni Defense: Old Benoni (A44) remains the largest negative outlier.

forecast.insight: Forecast directions suggest mixed momentum across openings, with 22 rising and 31 falling trajectories in the next horizon. The strongest signals are best read alongside uncertainty bands to separate stable trends from short-term noise.

engine_delta.insight: Engine-human deltas remain asymmetric: E98 leads positive outperformance, while A44 underperforms most against engine expectation. These outliers flag openings where practical play diverges most from theoretical evaluation.

heatmap.insight: Category-level heatmap patterns continue to show non-uniform performance over time, with month-to-month variation indicating shifting practical preferences across ECO families.
